title: Wholesome Uruguayan Pork Burger
description: A hearty, mustardy pork burger with a crumbly texture, perfect for a comforting Uruguayan meal.

ingredients.name: Ground pork (pork shoulder)
ingredients.notes: use lean cut for lower fat

instructions: In a large bowl, mix ground pork with salt, pepper, and garlic powder until just combined.
Stir in Dijon mustard, breadcrumbs, and egg until the mixture holds together.
Divide the mixture into four equal portions and shape each into a patty about 1 inch thick.
Preheat a yakimono grill or a direct‑heat grill to medium‑high.
Brush each patty lightly with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Place the patties on the grill and cook for 4 minutes on the first side.
Flip the patties and grill for an additional 4 minutes, or until internal temperature reaches 71°C.
While grilling, toast the burger buns on the grill for 1 minute until lightly browned.
Assemble each burger by placing a patty on a bun and topping with lettuce, tomato, and a slice of cheese if desired.
Serve hot with a side of roasted vegetables or a light salad.
